title: chasme pinifolia
intro: Chasme pinifolia, also known as the Chaste Tree or Vitex agnus-castus, is a perennial shrub native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties in regulating hormonal imbalances and menstrual cycles, and in reducing symptoms of menopause. The health benefits of Chasme pinifolia include alleviating anxiety and insomnia, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Chasme pinifolia include dried flowers and leaves, which can be consumed as tea, capsules, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
